Annex D -EUSR on AMR in zoonotic and indicator
bacteria from humans, animals and food2021/2022
Marked variations in the prevalence of presumptive ESBL- and/or AmpC-producing E. coli in
samples from food-producing animals and derived meat are demonstrated among MSs
(Chapter 5). These variations are also evident when assessing the occurrence of isolates with
ESBL or AmpC phenotypes separately (Figure 2, Figure 3, Figure 4 and Figure 5).
